## Description

Brief description of what this PR does.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation / tooling
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have tested this locally (or explained why I couldn't)
- [ ] This does not introduce new security risks (shell, file access, email, etc.)
- [ ] I considered Windows + Docker + Linux users
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior changed

## Related issues

Closes #xxx (if applicable)

## Notes for reviewer

Anything important to know when reviewing.
